title: How to Create Custom Skills in Claude  (Step-by-Step)
summary: A tutorial on creating custom skills in Claude to control model output format and structure. The example demonstrates building a "Smart PDF Analyzer" skill that produces 5-point summaries with highlighted data and formatted output, showing how skills enable users to standardize Claude's responses without changing the underlying model.
